info.title: RemediationsClient
info.description: Query component policy states at varying resource scopes for Resource Provider mode policies.

get.description: Gets all attestations for a resource.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression.

get.description: Gets an existing attestation at resource scope.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: attestationName
parameters.description: The name of the attestation.

put.description: Creates or updates an attestation at resource scope.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: attestationName
parameters.description: The name of the attestation.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: The attestation parameters.

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

delete.description: Deletes an existing attestation at individual resource scope.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: attestationName
parameters.description: The name of the attestation.

post.description: Queries component policy states for the resource.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: componentPolicyStatesResource
parameters.description: The virtual resource under ComponentPolicyStates resource type. In a given time range, 'latest' represents the latest component policy state(s).

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Ordering expression using OData notation. One or more comma-separated column names with an optional "desc" (the default) or "asc", e.g. "$orderby=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId asc".

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select expression using OData notation. Limits the columns on each record to just those requested, e.g. "$select=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId".

parameters.name: $from
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the start time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses ($to - 1-day).

parameters.name: $to
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the end time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses request time.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression.

parameters.name: $apply
parameters.description: OData apply expression for aggregations.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The $expand query parameter.

post.description: Queries policy events for the resource.

parameters.name: policyEventsResource
parameters.description: The name of the virtual resource under PolicyEvents resource type; only "default" is allowed.

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Ordering expression using OData notation. One or more comma-separated column names with an optional "desc" (the default) or "asc", e.g. "$orderby=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId asc".

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select expression using OData notation. Limits the columns on each record to just those requested, e.g. "$select=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId".

parameters.name: $from
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the start time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses ($to - 1-day).

parameters.name: $to
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the end time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses request time.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression.

parameters.name: $apply
parameters.description: OData apply expression for aggregations.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The $expand query parameter. For example, to expand components use $expand=components

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Skiptoken is only provided if a previous response returned a partial result as a part of nextLink element.

post.description: Queries policy states for the resource.

parameters.name: policyStatesResource
parameters.description: The virtual resource under PolicyStates resource type. In a given time range, 'latest' represents the latest policy state(s), whereas 'default' represents all policy state(s).

parameters.name: resourceId
parameters.description: Resource ID.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Ordering expression using OData notation. One or more comma-separated column names with an optional "desc" (the default) or "asc", e.g. "$orderby=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId asc".

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select expression using OData notation. Limits the columns on each record to just those requested, e.g. "$select=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId".

parameters.name: $from
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the start time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses ($to - 1-day).

parameters.name: $to
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the end time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses request time.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression.

parameters.name: $apply
parameters.description: OData apply expression for aggregations.

parameters.name: $expand
parameters.description: The $expand query parameter. For example, to expand components use $expand=components

parameters.name: $skiptoken
parameters.description: Skiptoken is only provided if a previous response returned a partial result as a part of nextLink element.

post.description: Summarizes policy states for the resource.

parameters.name: policyStatesSummaryResource
parameters.description: The virtual resource under PolicyStates resource type for summarize action. In a given time range, 'latest' represents the latest policy state(s) and is the only allowed value.

parameters.name: $top

post.description: Queries component policy states under subscription scope.

parameters.name: componentPolicyStatesResource
parameters.description: The virtual resource under ComponentPolicyStates resource type. In a given time range, 'latest' represents the latest component policy state(s).

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $orderby
parameters.description: Ordering expression using OData notation. One or more comma-separated column names with an optional "desc" (the default) or "asc", e.g. "$orderby=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId asc".

parameters.name: $select
parameters.description: Select expression using OData notation. Limits the columns on each record to just those requested, e.g. "$select=PolicyAssignmentId, ResourceId".

parameters.name: $from
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the start time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses ($to - 1-day).

parameters.name: $to
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the end time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses request time.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression.

parameters.name: $apply
parameters.description: OData apply expression for aggregations.

parameters.name: policyAssignmentName
parameters.description: Policy assignment name.

parameters.name: $top
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return.

parameters.name: $from
parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the start time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses ($to - 1-day).

parameters.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp specifying the end time of the interval to query. When not specified, the service uses request time.

parameters.name: $filter
parameters.description: OData filter expression.

AttestationEvidence.description: A piece of evidence supporting the compliance state set in the attestation.

description.description: The description for this piece of evidence.

sourceUri.description: The URI location of the evidence.

value.description: The Attestation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

AttestationProperties.description: The properties of an attestation resource.

policyAssignmentId.description: The resource ID of the policy assignment that the attestation is setting the state for.

policyDefinitionReferenceId.description: The policy definition reference ID from a policy set definition that the attestation is setting the state for. If the policy assignment assigns a policy set definition the attestation can choose a definition within the set definition with this property or omit this and set the state for the entire set definition.

complianceState.description: The compliance state that should be set on the resource.

expiresOn.description: The time the compliance state should expire.

owner.description: The person responsible for setting the state of the resource. This value is typically an Azure Active Directory object ID.

comments.description: Comments describing why this attestation was created.

evidence.description: The evidence supporting the compliance state set in this attestation.

lastComplianceStateChangeAt.description: The time the compliance state was last changed in this attestation.

assessmentDate.description: The time the evidence was assessed

CheckManagementGroupRestrictionsRequest.description: The check policy restrictions parameters describing the resource that is being evaluated.

resourceDetails.description: The information about the resource that will be evaluated.

pendingFields.description: The list of fields and values that should be evaluated for potential restrictions.

reason.description: The reason for the evaluation result.

CheckRestrictionsRequest.description: The check policy restrictions parameters describing the resource that is being evaluated.

resourceDetails.description: The information about the resource that will be evaluated.

pendingFields.description: The list of fields and values that should be evaluated for potential restrictions.

includeAuditEffect.description: Whether to include policies with the 'audit' effect in the results. Defaults to false.

CheckRestrictionsResourceDetails.description: The information about the resource that will be evaluated.

resourceContent.description: The resource content. This should include whatever properties are already known and can be a partial set of all resource properties.

apiVersion.description: The api-version of the resource content.

scope.description: The scope where the resource is being created. For example, if the resource is a child resource this would be the parent resource's resource ID.

CheckRestrictionsResult.description: The result of a check policy restrictions evaluation on a resource.

fieldRestrictions.description: The restrictions that will be placed on various fields in the resource by policy.

contentEvaluationResult.description: Evaluation results for the provided partial resource content.

CheckRestrictionsResultContentEvaluation.description: Evaluation results for the provided partial resource content.

policyEvaluations.description: Policy evaluation results against the given resource content. This will indicate if the partial content that was provided will be denied as-is.

count.description: Summarized count value for this compliance state.

ComplianceState.description: The compliance state that should be set on the resource.

values.name: Compliant
values.description: The resource is in compliance with the policy.

values.name: NonCompliant
values.description: The resource is not in compliance with the policy.

values.name: Unknown
values.description: The compliance state of the resource is not known.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for component policy event record.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID for the policy event record.

principalOid.description: Principal object ID for the user who initiated the resource component operation that triggered the policy event.

ComponentExpressionEvaluationDetails.description: Evaluation details of policy language expressions.

expressionKind.description: The kind of expression that was evaluated.

path.description: Property path if the expression is a field or an alias.

targetValue.description: Target value to be compared with the expression value.

operator.description: Operator to compare the expression value and the target value.

reason.description: Additional textual reason for the evaluation outcome.

@odata.id.description: OData entity ID; always set to null since component policy state records do not have an entity ID.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for the component policy state record.

policySetDefinitionId.description: Policy set definition ID, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionName.description: Policy set definition name, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionOwner.description: Policy set definition owner, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionCategory.description: Policy set definition category, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionParameters.description: Policy set definition parameters, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policyDefinitionReferenceId.description: Reference ID for the policy definition inside the policy set, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policyEvaluationDetails.description: Policy evaluation details. This is only included in the response if the request contains $expand=PolicyEvaluationDetails.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

@odata.count.description: OData entity count; represents the number of policy state records returned.

code.description: Service specific error code which serves as the substatus for the HTTP error code.

ExpressionEvaluationDetails.description: Evaluation details of policy language expressions.

expressionKind.description: The kind of expression that was evaluated.

path.description: Property path if the expression is a field or an alias.

targetValue.description: Target value to be compared with the expression value.

operator.description: Operator to compare the expression value and the target value.

FieldRestriction.description: The restrictions on a field imposed by a specific policy.

result.description: The type of restriction that is imposed on the field.

defaultValue.description: The value that policy will set for the field if the user does not provide a value.

values.description: The values that policy either requires or denies for the field.

policy.description: The details of the policy that is causing the field restriction.

policyEffect.description: The effect of the policy that is causing the field restriction. http://aka.ms/policyeffects

FieldRestrictionResult.description: The type of restriction that is imposed on the field.

values.name: Required
values.description: The field and/or values are required by policy.

values.name: Removed
values.description: The field will be removed by policy.

values.name: Deny
values.description: The field and/or values will be denied by policy.

values.name: Audit
values.description: The field and/or values will be audited by policy.

FieldRestrictions.description: The restrictions that will be placed on a field in the resource by policy.

field.description: The name of the field. This can be a top-level property like 'name' or 'type' or an Azure Policy field alias.

restrictions.description: The restrictions placed on that field by policy.

resourceId.description: ID of the last evaluated resource for IfNotExists effect.

totalResources.description: Total number of resources to which the existence condition is applicable.

isDataAction.description: Indicates whether the operation is a data action

display.description: Display metadata associated with the operation.

OperationDisplay.description: Display metadata associated with the operation.

resource.description: Resource name on which the operation is performed.

@odata.count.description: OData entity count; represents the number of operations returned.

PendingField.description: A field that should be evaluated against Azure Policy to determine restrictions.

field.description: The name of the field. This can be a top-level property like 'name' or 'type' or an Azure Policy field alias.

values.description: The list of potential values for the field that should be evaluated against Azure Policy.

policySetDefinitionId.description: Policy set definition ID, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

results.description: Compliance summary for the policy assignment.

effect.description: Policy effect, i.e. policy definition action.

results.description: Compliance summary for the policy definition.

PolicyEffectDetails.description: The details of the effect that was applied to the resource.

policyEffect.description: The effect that was applied to the resource. http://aka.ms/policyeffects

PolicyEvaluationResult.description: The result of a non-compliant policy evaluation against the given resource content.

policyInfo.description: The details of the policy that was evaluated.

evaluationResult.description: The result of the policy evaluation against the resource. This will typically be 'NonCompliant' but may contain other values if errors were encountered.

evaluationDetails.description: The detailed results of the policy expressions and values that were evaluated.

effectDetails.description: The details of the effect that was applied to the resource.

@odata.id.description: OData entity ID; always set to null since policy event records do not have an entity ID.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for the policy event record.

effectiveParameters.description: Effective parameters for the policy assignment.

isCompliant.description: Flag which states whether the resource is compliant against the policy assignment it was evaluated against.

policySetDefinitionId.description: Policy set definition ID, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionName.description: Policy set definition name, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionOwner.description: Policy set definition owner, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionCategory.description: Policy set definition category, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionParameters.description: Policy set definition parameters, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

managementGroupIds.description: Comma separated list of management group IDs, which represent the hierarchy of the management groups the resource is under.

policyDefinitionReferenceId.description: Reference ID for the policy definition inside the policy set, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID for the policy event record.

principalOid.description: Principal object ID for the user who initiated the resource operation that triggered the policy event.

components.description: Components events records populated only when URL contains $expand=components clause.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

@odata.count.description: OData entity count; represents the number of policy event records returned.

@odata.nextLink.description: Odata next link; URL to get the next set of results.

results.description: Compliance summary for the policy definition group.

code.description: Service specific error code which serves as the substatus for the HTTP error code.

value.description: The SlimPolicyMetadata items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

PolicyMetadataProperties.description: The properties of the policy metadata.

description.description: The description of the policy metadata.

requirements.description: The requirements of the policy metadata.

PolicyMetadataSlimProperties.description: The properties of the policy metadata, excluding properties containing large strings

category.description: The category of the policy metadata.

title.description: The title of the policy metadata.

owner.description: The owner of the policy metadata.

additionalContentUrl.description: Url for getting additional content about the resource metadata.

policyDefinitionId.description: The resource identifier of the policy definition.

policySetDefinitionId.description: The resource identifier of the policy set definition.

policyDefinitionReferenceId.description: The reference identifier of a specific policy definition within a policy set definition.

policyAssignmentId.description: The resource identifier of the policy assignment.

@odata.id.description: OData entity ID; always set to null since policy state records do not have an entity ID.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

timestamp.description: Timestamp for the policy state record.

effectiveParameters.description: Effective parameters for the policy assignment.

isCompliant.description: Flag which states whether the resource is compliant against the policy assignment it was evaluated against. This property is deprecated; please use ComplianceState instead.

policySetDefinitionId.description: Policy set definition ID, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionName.description: Policy set definition name, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionOwner.description: Policy set definition owner, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionCategory.description: Policy set definition category, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

policySetDefinitionParameters.description: Policy set definition parameters, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

managementGroupIds.description: Comma separated list of management group IDs, which represent the hierarchy of the management groups the resource is under.

policyDefinitionReferenceId.description: Reference ID for the policy definition inside the policy set, if the policy assignment is for a policy set.

components.description: Components state compliance records populated only when URL contains $expand=components clause.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

@odata.count.description: OData entity count; represents the number of policy state records returned.

@odata.nextLink.description: Odata next link; URL to get the next set of results.

RemediationDeployment.description: Details of a single deployment created by the remediation.

remediatedResourceId.description: Resource ID of the resource that is being remediated by the deployment.

deploymentId.description: Resource ID of the template deployment that will remediate the resource.

resourceLocation.description: Location of the resource that is being remediated.

error.description: Error encountered while remediated the resource.

createdOn.description: The time at which the remediation was created.

lastUpdatedOn.description: The time at which the remediation deployment was last updated.

RemediationDeploymentSummary.description: The deployment status summary for all deployments created by the remediation.

totalDeployments.description: The number of deployments required by the remediation.

successfulDeployments.description: The number of deployments required by the remediation that have succeeded.

failedDeployments.description: The number of deployments required by the remediation that have failed.

RemediationDeploymentsListResult.description: List of deployments for a remediation.

value.description: The RemediationDeployment items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

RemediationFilters.description: The filters that will be applied to determine which resources to remediate.

locations.description: The resource locations that will be remediated.

resourceIds.description: The IDs of the resources that will be remediated. Can specify at most 100 IDs. This filter cannot be used when ReEvaluateCompliance is set to ReEvaluateCompliance, and cannot be empty if provided.

value.description: The Remediation items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

policyAssignmentId.description: The resource ID of the policy assignment that should be remediated.

policyDefinitionReferenceId.description: The policy definition reference ID of the individual definition that should be remediated. Required when the policy assignment being remediated assigns a policy set definition.

resourceDiscoveryMode.description: The way resources to remediate are discovered. Defaults to ExistingNonCompliant if not specified.

provisioningState.description: The status of the remediation. This refers to the entire remediation task, not individual deployments. Allowed values are Evaluating, Canceled, Cancelling, Failed, Complete, or Succeeded.

createdOn.description: The time at which the remediation was created.

lastUpdatedOn.description: The time at which the remediation was last updated.

filters.description: The filters that will be applied to determine which resources to remediate.

deploymentStatus.description: The deployment status summary for all deployments created by the remediation.

statusMessage.description: The remediation status message. Provides additional details regarding the state of the remediation.

correlationId.description: The remediation correlation Id. Can be used to find events related to the remediation in the activity log.

resourceCount.description: Determines the max number of resources that can be remediated by the remediation job. If not provided, the default resource count is used.

parallelDeployments.description: Determines how many resources to remediate at any given time. Can be used to increase or reduce the pace of the remediation. If not provided, the default parallel deployments value is used.

percentage.description: A number between 0.0 to 1.0 representing the percentage failure threshold. The remediation will fail if the percentage of failed remediation operations (i.e. failed deployments) exceeds this threshold.

ResourceDiscoveryMode.description: The way resources to remediate are discovered. Defaults to ExistingNonCompliant if not specified.

values.name: ExistingNonCompliant
values.description: Remediate resources that are already known to be non-compliant.

values.name: ReEvaluateCompliance
values.description: Re-evaluate the compliance state of resources and then remediate the resources found to be non-compliant. The resourceIds filter cannot be used in this mode.

SlimPolicyMetadata.description: Slim version of policy metadata resource definition, excluding properties with large strings

id.description: The ID of the policy metadata.

type.description: The type of the policy metadata.

name.description: The name of the policy metadata.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

@odata.count.description: OData entity count; represents the number of summaries returned; always set to 1.

@odata.id.description: OData entity ID; always set to null since summaries do not have an entity ID.

@odata.context.description: OData context string; used by OData clients to resolve type information based on metadata.

results.description: Compliance summary for all policy assignments.

SummaryResults.description: Compliance summary on a particular summary level.

queryResultsUri.description: HTTP POST URI for queryResults action on Microsoft.PolicyInsights to retrieve raw results for the compliance summary. This property will not be available by default in future API versions, but could be queried explicitly.

resourceDetails.description: The resources summary at this level.

policyDetails.description: The policy artifact summary at this level. For query scope level, it represents policy assignment summary. For policy assignment level, it represents policy definitions summary.

policyGroupDetails.description: The policy definition group summary at this level.

type.description: The type of included error details.
